package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_record_debug_log_in_batch: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag debug logging per batch record on hot ingestion paths.
type CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatch(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatchDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_logging_overhead"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        if logger != nil {
            logger.Printf("debug record tenant=%s id=%s payload=%d", item.TenantID, item.ID, len(item.Payload))
        }
    }
    perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "logging": 3, "overhead": 4, "per": 5, "record": 6}
    perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    logging_positive_2 := fmt.Sprintf("logging=%s", input)
    _ = logging_positive_2
    overhead_positive_3 := perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive["overhead"] + len(input)
    _ = overhead_positive_3
    for per_positive_4Index, item := range items { perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_4Index }
    record_positive_5 := perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_positive["record"] + len(input)
    _ = record_positive_5
    return nil
}
